sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 252 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.21 & 22. 2. For orders on CMA No. 392/19. (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 10.12.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, Advocate for Applicant. Learned counsel states that in view of paragraph-19 of the impugned judgment, whereby, it is observed that the matter has been squarely determined by the Supreme Court, no question of law arises to be entertained. In view of hereof, this reference is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
